titleStmt.title: SII 10.497: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 497. (A.R. No. 260 of 1905.) ON A PILLAR SET UP TO THE EAST OF THE DARK ROOM IN THE TEMPLE OF TRIPURĀNTAKĒŚVARA, TRIPURĀNTAKAM, MARKAPUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT. Ś. 1230. (Kīlaka)

summary.p: States that Vollaya Reḍḍi, brother of Ellaya Reḍḍi the agent of Pratāpa-Rudradēva, assigned to god Tripurāntakadēva, the income from the sale of goods of all kinds (which may be conveyed to Tripurāntakamu) by Pedda-Māchana and Pina-Māchana on their one hundred pack cattle.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīśakava¨rṣaṁbulu
1230 Agu nēṁṭi kīlakasaṁvatsa
ra puṣya ba 15 Ā . nāṁṭi A¨rdhō
dayapuṇyakālamaṁdu
svasti śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalē
śvara kākatiyyapratāparudra
dēvamahārājulakuṁ bu
ṇyamu gānu svasti śrīmatu
sa¨rvvādhikāru laina lakamu
Ellayareḍḍiṁgāri Anna volla
yareḍḍiṁgāru śrītripurāṁtta
kadēvuni saṁnidhini caṁgamare
ḍi nūṁkana koḍukulu pedda
mācana pinamācanalu peṟi
gē peṟukalu nūṟunu vāru
Ēsaraku peṟigi teccinānu śrī
tripurāṁttakadēvuni Aṁgaraṁ
gabhōgā¨rtthamugānu dhārāpū
¨rvvakamu cēśi Ācaṁdrā¨rkasthā
yigānu sa¨rvvamānyamugā ni
śtimi .
Digital edition of SII 10.497 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
